name: Alternun Impact Platform
description: Comprehensive platform for tracking, verifying, and monetizing environmental and social impact through the AIRS rating system.

offers.name: Individual Impact Tracking
offers.description: Track personal carbon footprint, renewable energy, and community contributions with real-time AIRS scoring

offers.name: Enterprise ESG Monitoring
offers.description: Monitor organizational supply chain sustainability, employee impact, and ESG metrics with audit-ready reporting

offers.name: API Access
offers.description: Integrate Alternun impact tracking into existing systems via REST API with real-time webhooks

offers.name: Marketplace Access
offers.description: Trade verified AIRS tokens representing environmental and social impact

itemListElement.name: Impact Scoring (AIRS)
itemListElement.description: Proprietary algorithm converting environmental and social actions into quantifiable tokens

itemListElement.name: Data Integration
itemListElement.description: Multi-source aggregation from carbon apps, supply chains, IoT sensors, and custom sources

itemListElement.name: Blockchain Verification
itemListElement.description: Immutable distributed ledger records of verified impact

itemListElement.name: Impact Marketplace
itemListElement.description: Trade verified impact tokens with ESG-focused organizations

itemListElement.name: Analytics Dashboard
itemListElement.description: Real-time monitoring and reporting of impact metrics
